mapper.select: SELECT pr_id AS prId, repo_id AS repoId, title AS title, description AS description, user_id AS userId, create_at AS createAt, is_opened AS isOpened, source_branch AS sourceBranch, target_branch AS targetBranch FROM pr WHERE repo_id = #{repoId}

SELECT pr_id AS prId, repo_id AS repoId, title AS title, description AS description, user_id AS userId, create_at AS createAt, is_opened AS isOpened, source_branch AS sourceBranch, target_branch AS targetBranch FROM pr WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId}
SELECT commit_id AS commitId, repo_id AS repoId, pr_id AS prId, content AS content, commited_at AS commitedAt FROM commit WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId}
SELECT commit_id AS commitId, repo_id AS repoId, pr_id AS prId, content AS content, commited_at AS commitedAt FROM commit WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} AND commit_id = #{commitId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (pr_id, content, comment_type, depth, image_name, created_at) VALUES (#{prId}, #{content}, #{commentType}, #{depth}, #{imageName}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} AND comment_id = #{commentId}
DELETE FROM comment WHERE repo_id = #{repoId} AND pr_id = #{prId} AND re_comment_id = #{reCommentId}
mapper.select: SELECT f.file_id AS fileId, f.commit_id AS commitId, f.file_name AS fileName, f.old_path AS oldPath, f.new_path AS newPath FROM file f JOIN commit c ON f.commit_id = c.commit_id WHERE c.pr_id = #{prId} AND c.repo_id = #{repoId}
SELECT f.file_id AS fileId, f.commit_id AS commitId, f.file_name AS fileName, f.old_path AS oldPath, f.new_path AS newPath FROM file f WHERE f.commit_id = #{commitId}
SELECT f.file_id AS fileId, f.commit_id AS commitId, f.file_name AS fileName, f.old_path AS oldPath, f.new_path AS newPath FROM file f WHERE f.file_id = #{fileId}
